name: aios
description: Your second brain for Claude Code — persistent memory, learned patterns, and skills that improve over time.

plugins.name: aios
plugins.description: Your second brain for Claude Code — persistent memory, learned patterns, and skills that improve over time.

skills.name: aios-init
skills.description: Bootstrap a new AI-OS in the current directory — conversational onboarding that scaffolds your brain, configures skills, and sets up the self-improvement loop.

skills.name: brain-search
skills.description: Search the AI-OS brain for relevant files, entities, and knowledge before starting work.

skills.name: decision-check
skills.description: Search prior decisions on a topic — prevents contradictions and surfaces relevant history.

skills.name: nightly-brain-consolidation
skills.description: Nightly brain consolidation — processes short-term memory, extracts patterns, improves skills.

skills.name: morning-briefing
skills.description: Daily morning briefing — scans Gmail and GCal, produces a prioritized summary of what needs attention.

skills.name: email-triage
skills.description: Daily email triage — categorizes inbox, drafts priority replies, surfaces what actually matters.

skills.name: meeting-prep
skills.description: Prepare a meeting brief — surfaces relationship context, prior decisions, and open commitments.

skills.name: relationship-check
skills.description: Check the status of a relationship — last contact, open commitments, suggested next action.

skills.name: project-status
skills.description: Quick status check on any active project — progress, blockers, days since activity, next actions.

skills.name: brain-dump-content
skills.description: Process a brain dump into content drafts — extract ideas, research, draft posts.

skills.name: content-interview
skills.description: Structured interview to extract content ideas — Claude asks, you answer, drafts get created.

skills.name: reflect
skills.description: On-demand reflection — goal-by-goal progress check, pattern analysis, strategic course correction.

skills.name: foresight
skills.description: Forward-looking strategic planning — ranked priorities for the week ahead based on goals and patterns.

skills.name: thalamus-calibration
skills.description: Nightly self-improvement for the thalamus signal detector — identifies misses, proposes pattern updates.

hooks.name: session-start
hooks.description: Creates a short-term memory file for the session and injects vital signs plus learned patterns into context.

hooks.name: session-end
hooks.description: Archives the session transcript into HIPPOCAMPUS/short-term/transcripts/ so nightly consolidation can read it.

hooks.name: post-tool-failure
hooks.description: Logs every tool or MCP failure to CEREBELLUM/tool-errors.log so the system can learn from them.
